CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayReverse(arr) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayReverse(arr) AS reversed_array FROM test_arrays WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT t.id, arrayReverse(t.arr) AS reversed_array FROM test_arrays t WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_arrays WHERE id = t.id AND arr != []);
SELECT id, arrayReverse(arrayConcat(arr, [10])) AS reversed_array FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayReverse(arr) FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayLength(arr) > 2;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int32, value Array(Int32));
SELECT t1.id, arrayReverse(t1.arr) AS reversed_array, t2.value FROM test_arrays AS t1 JOIN test_join AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, arrayReverse(arr) FROM test_arrays UNION SELECT id, arrayReverse(value) FROM test_join;
SELECT id, (SELECT arrayReverse(arr) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = t.id) AS reversed_array FROM test_arrays t;
